opsworks.layer.lifecycleeventconfigurati.Docs: Whether to enable Elastic Load Balancing connection draining. For more information, see [Connection Draining](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ElasticLoadBalancing/latest/DeveloperGuide/TerminologyandKeyConcepts.html#conn-drain)
The time, in seconds, that AWS OpsWorks Stacks waits after triggering a Shutdown event before shutting down an instance.
